== Notes for [[Item:Q101226|Q101226]] ==

http://e-spacio.uned.es/fez/eserv/bibliuned:ETFSerieIII-2015-28-7110/Eclesiastico_de_las_elites_judeoconversas.pdf (page 308)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9A61551EFBBFA9822EF79916C2E09
geni:6000000081298369074

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
